repoDefaults: Treat this repository as a governed deterministic pnpm + Turbo monorepo.
Active topology is packages/contracts -> packages/core -> apps/*.
packages/contracts contains interfaces and shared types only.
packages/core must remain runtime-neutral and may depend only on @ccd/contracts.
Runtime APIs must be adapter-injected from apps/web-demo/src/adapters/** or apps/desktop/src/adapters/**.
For desktop/Tauri work, keep @tauri-apps imports and invoke() inside apps/desktop/src/adapters/**.
Use governance commands: pnpm governance:full, pnpm arch:runtime, pnpm api:report, and pnpm supply:check.

packageResponsibilities.@ccd/contracts: Cross-runtime interfaces and DTO contracts only.
packageResponsibilities.@ccd/core: Minimal runtime-neutral adapter facade; not a shared frontend bucket.
packageResponsibilities.@ccd/design-tokens: Shared design token source and theme/size/breakpoint primitives.
packageResponsibilities.@ccd/unocss-preset: Shared UnoCSS preset, safelist, and build-time styling helpers.
packageResponsibilities.@ccd/vue-app-platform: Shared frontend app bootstrap lifecycle and platform orchestration primitives.
packageResponsibilities.@ccd/web-demo: Browser web-demo application shell, routes, pages, stores, app adapters, app-level plugin wiring, and temporary app-local shared candidates.
packageResponsibilities.@ccd/desktop: Dedicated Tauri desktop runtime shell with its own frontend entry, desktop adapters, and src-tauri backend boundary; not a full duplicate of web-demo.

boundaryStatus.runtimeNeutralCore: validated by pnpm arch:runtime and pnpm arch:boundaries
boundaryStatus.removedRuntimeImports: validated by dependency and runtime boundary checks
